options.command: if command -v uv >/dev/null; then uv build; else echo 'SKIPPED: uv not installed; real publish builds run in mirror CI' >&2; fi
if command -v uv >/dev/null; then uv run --group dev ruff check .; else echo 'SKIPPED: uv not installed; real lint runs in mirror CI' >&2; fi
if command -v uv >/dev/null; then uv run --group dev pytest; else echo 'SKIPPED: uv not installed; tests run in mirror CI' >&2; fi
